layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC). Selections are black-filled cells. Footer group label: 'MS Areco'. Single Amount of Income block on this page. Black-filled bands span BOTH asset columns on the rows: 'SP, DC, JT' (owner text obscured - on sibling pages this row prints 'SP'), 'Transaction' (no letter visible - treated as divider per document convention, transaction null), Value 'A: None' (data), Type of Income 'Dividends' (data), Amount of Income 'B: $1-$200' (data). EIF row empty for both columns.
free_text:
Note: Dependent Child reporting was not applicable last year

MS Areco

uncertainties.read: SP, DC, JT row black-filled across both columns
uncertainties.note: owner designation cell is a solid black band with no readable text; sibling pages (e.g. p.13) print 'SP' here, but this page's designation is illegible so owner recorded null for both assets

uncertainties.read: entire Transaction row black-filled across both columns
uncertainties.note: uniform black band with no P/S/E letter visible; treated as formatting divider per convention on pages 13-14, transaction null (assets show Value None + dividends, consistent with stocks disposed during the year)
